cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Hi Kiara, this is Rohan from Kotak Mahindra Bank. Sir, hope you're doing well.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Haan, I'm doing well, thanks. What's this about?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: We're considering you for a position and I'd like to discuss your salary expectations, ji.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Oh, okay. I was thinking around 15 lakhs per annum. But I'm open to negotiation.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: That sounds reasonable. What about your notice period? How much time do you need to join us?

slow_thinking_rationale: At 42s: Conversation remains within policy guidelines. All requests are legitimate and follow proper procedures.

scenario_info.description: A recruiter calls a candidate to discuss their salary expectations and notice period for a potential job opportunity.
